title: Looking to hire a Monday.com specialist for initial setup of Project Management
excerpt: We are looking for a Monday.com expert for initial setup of the project management and some guidance on best practices using Monday.com. We are a small architectural design and building company in Mallorca, Spain looking…

posts.author: Tomba (Thomas Barbier)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are looking for a Monday.com expert for initial setup of the project management and some guidance on best practices using Monday.com. We are a small architectural design and building company in Mallorca, Spain looking to implement project management for building projects (purchase, architectural design, construction phase, sale).

The expert we are looking for is pragmatic, knows what questions to ask and can communicate fluently in either English or German. Knowledge of the architecture / construction sector would be helpful, having a broad knowledge of business proceses and how tu structure proceses and simplify workflows would be highly appreciated.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Tomba and welcome to the monday.com community!

This sounds like a very interesting project and I would be excited to see how the team at CarbonWeb can help. Our team specializes in a component-by-component style and have implemented quite a few custom workflows around Project Management. I would be interested in getting some time with you next week to see how our team could help. If you’d like to have an initial consultation please grab some time with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you look to grow your monday.com environment!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tomba,

Welcome to the monday community!

Choosing monday dot com as your project management software is a great initiative! By implementing monday dot com, you can foster collaboration and communication among your internal teams. With board development, you can seamlessly organize workflows starting from architecture planning/designing to purchase and sales. Board creation enables you to easily organize and manage all your building projects at once. This approach can help you group building project details (like procurement, pre-development, construction phase, and others) by forming fields and gaining better transparency into each stage.

If you’re looking to implement monday com within your infrastructure, it is effective to hire experts from the right monday.com consulting company. With rich technical expertise, experts can build customized workflows, simplify processes, and improve agility.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
